title: Create: Gunpowder
body:
#

Create: Gunpowder

![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Available_for-1.21.1-blue) ![Mod Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod_Loader-NeoForge-orange) Create: Gunpowder adds production chains to produce gunpowder, mainly for modpacks or worlds where creepers don’t exist or drop it. Instead of mob farms, gunpowder becomes a processed resource that fits naturally into Create’s progression. ### Production Crush Flint --> Flint Shard Mill Coal --> Carbon Dust Mill Sand --> Mineral Dust Mix Flint + Coal --> Volatile Powder Mix Volatile Powder + Sand + Water + Heat --> Gunpowder ![Recipe Path](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6c9891031b95f3a67822b1bd91b00e74c499e22.png)
